overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked character traversing a misty grassland filled with gothic ruins. The sky is dominated by a massive glowing red Erdtree emitting floating embers, creating a dark fantasy atmosphere with dramatic warm lighting against teal-green mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy approach to gothic stone mausoleum with distant red tree visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a large ornate stone mausoleum structure on the left

entered.detail: large dark stone structure with ornate carvings and red glowing embers floating around it
massive glowing red tree visible in the distant sky with golden light rays
crumbling stone walls and towers scattered across the hillside
cluster of evergreen trees with autumn-colored foliage

segments.scene_description: The character walks through tall grass approaching a large gothic stone mausoleum on the left. In the distance, the massive red Erdtree glows against the overcast sky, with floating red embers drifting through the air. The landscape features scattered ruins and pine trees shrouded in mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with massive burning tree dominating the sky

events.description: passing the stone mausoleum reveals the massive glowing red Erdtree filling the sky
the red glow from the Erdtree becomes more intense as the character moves into the open field

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the field as the view opens to reveal the massive red tree dominating the horizon

entered.detail: field of tall grass dotted with small white wildflowers

segments.scene_description: As the character passes the mausoleum, the massive Erdtree dominates the sky with its glowing red branches and falling embers. The ground transitions to a field of white flowers, and broken stone ruins appear on the right. The lighting shifts to a more intense red glow from the tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty grassland with scattered ruins and distant valley

agents.ego_description: traversing the open field toward distant ruins with the red tree still visible to the left

entered.detail: fallen stone tower lying on its side among the grass
large moss-covered rocks and stone debris

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open grassland as the Erdtree shifts to the left side of the frame. Scattered ruins including a collapsed tower and boulders dot the landscape on the right. The misty valley extends into the distance with faint structures visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty grassland that gradually opens into a wide, ruin-strewn valley dominated by a glowing red celestial tree. It begins with the character walking through tall grass toward a gothic stone mausoleum, while red embers drift through a hazy sky. As the character passes the mausoleum, the terrain transitions into a field of white flowers and the lighting intensifies into a deep red glow emanating from the massive branches above. The scene then expands across the open grassland as the tree shifts to the left of the frame, revealing a collapsed tower and scattered boulders on the right. Finally, the camera pushes forward into the misty valley, where faint, distant structures emerge through the lingering haze.
